/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libflappy_robot_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so -o rosidl_generator_py/flappy_robot_msgs/libflappy_robot_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so CMakeFiles/flappy_robot_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.dir/rosidl_generator_py/flappy_robot_msgs/msg/_flappy_status_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/lyda/ros2_ws/build/flappy_robot_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libflappy_robot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so libflappy_robot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
